patch_description: Switch the center optimization to a multi-start strategy where radii are computed exactly by solving a linear program given the centers. The objective of the center optimization now uses the LP-derived radii, leading to a more faithful evaluation of the true feasible packing. This removes the previous heuristic radii update in favor of a exact LP-based radii calculation, potentially enabling much higher total radii. Additionally, add multiple deterministic seeds to explore diverse regions of the search space and pick the best result among them. Expected outcome: higher combined score and closer approach to known upper bounds for 26 circles.
